query:
ALTER TABLE activity_log
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS userName VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS entityName VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS oldValues JSON NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS newValues JSON NULL;

  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS userName VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS entityName VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS oldValues JSON NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS newValues JSON NULL;
